label: Cinder knowledge relay
prompt:
EXPLAINER REGISTER — one hand-built horizontal relay, four readable stations, no corporate infographic polish.

IDEA: Operational knowledge should travel from person to person while authority stays with the human.

SCENE / STRUCTURE: Cinder is a working participant in a tactile four-stage knowledge relay, moving left to right across one continuous workbench. At station one Cinder uncovers a rough instruction card from a pile of fragmented tools. At station two Cinder places that card into a small open portable kit. At station three Cinder carefully follows the card while operating a simple radio-like device, with the action visibly traceable. At station four Cinder checks a physical result and hands the proven card to a second tiny relay beacon. Connect the four stations with one imperfect ember-orange hand-drawn path. The structure must read instantly as discover → load → act visibly → verify, using at most these four tiny hand-lettered labels: DISCOVER, LOAD, ACT, VERIFY. Cinder is load-bearing in every stage, never a decorative mascot.

CHARACTER LOCK: Match the attached Cinder model sheet exactly: one plump light-ash bird; thick rounded charcoal outline; two dot eyes; tiny beak nub; folded wings; stubby legs; single flame crest as the only vivid accent. Keep the same compact proportions and simple silhouette. Quiet survivor, careful steward, grounded hope; no triumphant pose, no costume, no added anatomy.

ART DIRECTION: editorial risograph print on warm off-white uncoated paper. One bold softly rounded charcoal outline. Visible paper grain, sparse halftone, slight ink-layer misregistration, flat shapes, hand-built arrows and callouts, imperfect human marks. Dense enough to reward inspection but with strong negative space and a clean reading order. No photorealism, 3D, gradients, glossy rendering, UI panels, formal flowchart boxes, crypto imagery, hacker clichés, circuit-board wallpaper, generic icons, logos, or decorative headline.

PALETTE: charcoal #102F29, warm bone #F5F3DF, ember orange #FF6B35, solar yellow #FFE378, quiet cyan #8AD6DC, leaf green #96D83F. Ember orange is the primary accent; keep cyan and green sparse. No colors outside this palette except tiny paper-grain variation.

COMPOSITION: wide 16:9 landscape. Safe generous margins. All four stations fully visible and separated, Cinder never cropped, no content touching edges. Designed for a dark website section where this illustration appears as a luminous printed artifact.


Aspect ratio: 16:9.
